title: ?field= put silently discards other KV fields — footgun
description: put with ?field= writes {field: value} as a complete new KV version; any other fields in the previous version are dropped. This is documented in both the module-level doc and the inline comment, but the typical user mental model is "update one field, keep the rest." Vault KV v2 has no field-level update operation, so this is correct behavior, but it will generate issues from users who expected partial update semantics. The doc says it once; it should probably appear in the ?field= URI example in the module doc as well, so it is visible before a user writes code.
